detail.rationale: W1-3's plan.yaml entry (authored during the 2026-05-16 bootstrap) lists 5 files in output_contract but its acceptance_criteria + purpose explicitly require wiring MultiHorizonAnticipatoryLearning into ExperimentManager — which requires touching python_refactor/src/experiments/experiment_manager.py. The 5-file list is a planning inconsistency I am closing now via replan-resize. The expanded files list adds experiment_manager.py (1 file). No new acceptance criteria; no schedule change; no dependency change. Resize is the smallest available action — split would create an unnecessary 2-PR cascade for what is a single coherent wiring unit.

detail.operator_note: Approved: scope-resize to add experiment_manager.py per directive #4 (plan.yaml mutation paired with accept in same diff). Authored on chore/replan-W1-3-resize branch to keep feat/w1-3's P3 contract-alone discipline clean.

detail.rationale: W1 cleanup sweep — adds wave W2 with 4 file-disjoint units that close 5 carries documented in W1-3/W1-4/W1-5 retros + 1 packaging gap. (W2-1 closes W1-4-CARRY-1/2 via 1-line belief-coefficient bug fix + un-skip + magic-number replacement; W2-2 closes W1-3-CARRY-1/2 via test-file import-style sweep + thesis_aligned_experiment fix; W2-3 closes W1-5-CARRY-1 via .dfg/context-map.yaml cleanup; W2-4 adds pyproject.toml + uv lock + ruff sweep of 3 legacy files). All 4 units file-disjoint and form a single parallel group — encoded as parallel_groups: [[W2-1, W2-2, W2-3, W2-4]] for max parallelism per operator directive 2026-05-16. Wave W1 wave-close ceremony follows W2 merge.

detail.operator_note: Approved: add wave W2 with 4 file-disjoint units (W2-1..W2-4) in a single parallel group. Closes 5 W1 carries + 1 packaging gap. Per operator directive #4 (paired diff).
